summary: Created update.py for pulling N5OS content from substrate without breaking personalization. Supports selective updates (--component), dry-run mode, force updates, and automatic re-personalization. Uses version comparison to determine outdated components, fetches from remote URLs or local paths, and maintains installed.yaml state tracking.
learnings: Version comparison needs graceful handling of non-standard version strings - fallback to treating as needing update
Remote file listing from GitHub raw URLs requires a separate manifest since directory listing isn't available

test_results.dry_run: Shows 'Already up to date' or lists available updates
test_results.component_filter: --component flag correctly filters to single component
